triggers.name: Enemy cast: Gate
triggers.pattern: ^(.+) (?:begins casting Gate|begins to cast the gate spell)\.$
triggers.comments: Matches both the Legends named form and the classic 'begins to cast the gate spell.' string (eqstr 1038).

triggers.name: Enemy cast: Heals
triggers.comments: Merged alternation over 1 spell names: Complete Heal

triggers.name: Enemy cast: Fear
triggers.pattern: ^(.+) begins casting (Terrorize Animal|Chase the Moon|Panic the Dead|Inspire Fear|Wave of Fear|Dragon Roar|Invoke Fear|Panic|Fear)(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Merged alternation over 9 spell names: Chase the Moon, Dragon Roar, Fear, Inspire Fear, Invoke Fear, Panic, Panic the Dead, Terrorize Animal, Wave of Fear

triggers.name: Enemy cast: anything
triggers.comments: Catch-all for any named cast. Overlay only; enable for recon, not for everyday play.
